title: CID
desc: ACP Pradyuman, Daya and Abhijeet are an elite trio of officers who work for the CID. Together, they seek the help of professional forensic expert Dr Salunkhe to solve various criminal cases.

title: Dwarkadheesh
desc: Krishna, the reincarnated avatar of Lord Vishnu, defeats the evil Kamsa and claims his throne as the prince of Dwarka. Additionally, his bonds with other people are also highlighted.

title: Ramayan
desc: Prince Rama embarks on a daring mission to save his kidnapped wife Sita from the evil Ravana. Aided by his loyal brother Lakshmana and an army of monkeys, Rama faces various challenges in his journey.

title: Mahima Shani Dev Ki
desc: Lord Shani, a dominant celestial figure in Hindu astrology, dispels misconceptions about his mystical existence through his actions.

title: Devi Aadi Parashakti
desc: A religious scholar provides a detailed discourse on various spiritual teachings to devotees and encourages them to lead a faithful lifestyle.

title: Crime Alert
desc: The host presents a collection of true stories involving ordinary citizens who committed horrific crimes for the sake of love, revenge and various other motivating factors.
